message:
fix(store): resolve O(N) DoS vulnerability in BITOP

The BITOP command evaluated the operation type (AND, OR, XOR) inside the inner byte-processing loop. With string lengths up to 512 MiB and multiple keys, this caused a massive CPU bottleneck due to millions of redundant string comparisons. This commit hoists the operation check outside the loop, restoring O(N) time complexity where N is the length of the string.
